'''vawanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xyloma|xyloma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xyloma|xyloma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vawanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væwængæth|væwængæth]] || [[word:væwængæj|væwængæj]] || [[word:væwængæsh|væwængæsh]] || [[word:væwængæ|væwængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vawawangath|vawawangath]] || [[word:vawawangaj|vawawangaj]] || [[word:vawawangash|vawawangash]] || [[word:vawawanga|vawawanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vawangath|vawangath]] || [[word:vawangaj|vawangaj]] || [[word:vawangash|vawangash]] || [[word:vawanga|vawanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vawafngath|vawafngath]] || [[word:vawafngaj|vawafngaj]] || [[word:vawafngash|vawafngash]] || [[word:vawafngaf|vawafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vawangatha|vawangatha]] || [[word:vawangaja|vawangaja]] || [[word:vawangasha|vawangasha]] || [[word:vawangaka|vawangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vawangath|vawangath]] || [[word:vawangaj|vawangaj]] || [[word:vawangash|vawangash]] || [[word:vawanga|vawanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vawangathal|vawangathal]] || [[word:vawangajal|vawangajal]] || [[word:vawangashal|vawangashal]] || [[word:vawangakal|vawangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vawangathatha|vawangathatha]] || [[word:vawangajaja|vawangajaja]] || [[word:vawangashasha|vawangashasha]] || [[word:vawangaka|vawangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vawangathan|vawangathan]] || [[word:vawangajan|vawangajan]] || [[word:vawangashan|vawangashan]] || [[word:vawangakan|vawangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vawangathaoro|vawangathaoro]] || [[word:vawangajaoro|vawangajaoro]] || [[word:vawangashaoro|vawangashaoro]] || [[word:vawangakaoro|vawangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
